response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Report the retrieved record, saved preferences, and filtered list as distinct findings.
Return exactly three bullets and include every record ID returned by the tools.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call shipping_get, shipping_profile, and shipping_list together; every argument is user-supplied, so no call consumes another call's result.

prompt: For the dispatch handoff, run three independent read-only checks in one assistant action: retrieve shi-208; load the saved operational preferences; and list active shipments in Portland. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. Keep the final answer to exactly three bullets and include every record ID returned by the tools.
